description: You are a Facility Manager for a commercial property firm integrating renewable energy assets. Log in to OpenMaint (admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/) and configure the system to track new rooftop solar panel installations. Create a new active Class named 'SolarPanel' as a subclass of 'CI' (or 'Equipment'/'Asset' if 'CI' is unavailable). Add five custom attributes to this class: 'PanelCapacityKW' (Decimal), 'InstallationDate' (Date), 'Manufacturer' (String), 'InverterType' (String), and 'PanelCount' (Integer). Register three new solar panel records for the first three buildings in the system using the details provided in /home/ga/Desktop/solar_panel_spec.txt, ensuring each record is linked to its corresponding Building.
